findings.fix: N/A - All files within planned scope

T001.details: Tailwind CSS initialized with PostCSS and Autoprefixer. postcss.config.mjs uses @tailwindcss/postcss plugin. globals.css contains @import "tailwindcss" (v4 syntax). Configuration verified in tsconfig.json with baseUrl.

T002.details: shadcn/ui initialized with CSS variables. components.json created with correct aliases (@/ prefix), style: new-york, baseColor: neutral, cssVariables: true. globals.css includes CSS variable definitions. lib/utils.ts with cn() utility exists.

T003.details: Button and Card components added from shadcn. Files exist at src/components/ui/button.tsx and src/components/ui/card.tsx. Components use @/ alias for imports. Properly export PascalCase components.

T004.details: @xyflow/react v12.10.0 installed in dependencies. Meets v12.7+ requirement. Zustand peer dependency resolved automatically by pnpm. No peer dependency warnings expected.

T005.details: @dnd-kit/core v6.3.1, @dnd-kit/sortable v10.0.0, @dnd-kit/utilities v3.2.2 installed. While sortable v10 exceeds v6.x guidance, this is documented in plan discoveries as expected (latest stable). All packages present in package.json.

T006.details: CSS import order established in app/layout.tsx. ReactFlow CSS (@xyflow/react/dist/style.css) imported BEFORE globals.css. Comment documents Critical Finding 06 requirement. Order is critical for ReactFlow styling.

T007.details: Feature flags infrastructure created in src/lib/feature-flags.ts. Defines FEATURES object with WORKFLOW_VISUALIZATION, KANBAN_BOARD, SSE_UPDATES flags. Includes isFeatureEnabled(flag) helper. Uses NEXT_PUBLIC_* env vars for client-side access per Next.js standards.

T008.details: ReactFlow verification component created in test/verification/test-reactflow.tsx (not src/ - correct placement per plan). Has 'use client' directive. Creates minimal 3-node graph with 2 edges. Imports ReactFlow, Background, Controls. Component compiles without errors.

T009.details: dnd-kit verification component created in test/verification/test-dndkit.tsx (not src/ - correct placement per plan). Has 'use client' directive. Renders DndContext with SortableContext. Implements SortableItem with drag transforms and keyboard/pointer sensors. No RSC errors expected.

T010.details: All quality gates pass: 238 tests passing (24 test files), no lint errors, no typecheck errors, build succeeds. Foundation is solid for Phase 2.

R-CODE-001.note: tsconfig.json extends strict: true from root; new code compiles with strict type checking

R-CODE-003.note: button.tsx, card.tsx, test-reactflow.tsx, test-dndkit.tsx all use kebab-case

R-CODE-004.rule: Import Organization (path aliases, export type for interfaces)
R-CODE-004.note: All new code uses @/ and @chainglass/* aliases; no relative imports between packages

R-CODE-005.rule: Formatting (Biome, 2-space indent, single quotes, trailing commas, 100 char limit)
R-CODE-005.note: Code follows project formatting standards; no violations detected

R-ARCH-001.note: Feature flags are pure functions; components use standard React patterns

R-ARCH-003.rule: No @injectable decorators (use useFactory pattern, RSC compatible)
R-ARCH-003.note: No decorators in new Phase 1 code; components are RSC-compatible

R-TEST-001.note: Phase 1 is infrastructure; verification components prove imports work (238 tests in other areas pass)
